item.description: How I passed the AWS Solutions Architect-Associate Certification Exam

item.title: Kindle to Notion
item.description: A way to seamlessly transfer your Kindle highlights to Notion Database!

item.title: Face Landmarks Detection using CNN
item.description: Can computers really understand the human face?

item.title: Machine Learning - Visualized
item.description: A visual approach to understand machine learning

item.title: Face Dataset Compression using PCA
item.description: Principal Component Analysis for Image Dataset Compression

item.title: Principal Component Analysis - Visualized
item.description: Data compression using Principal Component Analysis (PCA)

item.title: Customer Churn Analysis
item.description: 🔗 GitHub Description One of the most important parts of running any business is to understand the value of your customers. And in order to survive, or even thrive in your business is to identify customers who are not hesitant to leave your business and turn towards your competitor. Customer churn model aims to identify this and generate a binary value - indicating whether a customer will churn or not. In this paper customer information from an Iranian Telecommunication company was used to predict if a customer will churn or not.

item.title: E-Society
item.description: 🔗 GitHub Description In my final Year of bachelor’s degree, I had developed an application titled “E Society”. The main purpose of this was to serve the residents of the Society, Colony or Apartments. With the use of Android Studio & Java programming language, we developed a application that helped to decrease the problems that were associated with paying of monthly bills such as maintenance, electricity, and water bills. The application would also remind meetings and event updates.

item.title: Webcam-Detection
item.description: 🔗 GitHub Description In this project, I have build the program which starts the computer webcam and it waits for objects to enter the view. And if the new object enters the view, The Program will send you the Email. In that email, the object that entered the view attached as a picture.

item.title: Todo List App
item.description: 🔗 View App 🔗 GitHub GUI 🔗 GitHub Web Description A distraction-free app to help you focus on creating and completing tasks. A to-do list web and Desktop application built using Python that allows the user to add, remove and edit their todos. I built this app while learning Python.

item.title: Web Scraping Musical Event
item.description: 🔗 GitHub Description A program that checks a music band’s website and sends an email when there are new tours.

item.title: Weather Forecast App
item.description: 🔗 View App 🔗 GitHub Description A data web app that visualizes the weather forecast for the next five days of any city.
